name: Pink Scare
content: “If there is not a pink frock, then what is there?” asks the woman of naivety. I respond: “There is a guilt.”
The newspapers print haphazardly and in great service to the fiefdom provide primary lists of suspects and associates and non-innocents for me to prosecute.
“If there is not a khaki uniform, then what is there?” asks the man of naivety. I respond: “There is a guilt.”
